| `fcvt.s.w` | `rd, rs1` | $rd \leftarrow (float)\ rs1$ | Enter amb signe → flotant |
| `fcvt.s.wu` | `rd, rs1` | $rd \leftarrow (float)\ rs1$ | Natural → flotant |
| `fcvt.w.s` | `rd, rs1` | $rd \leftarrow (int)\ rs1$ | Flotant → enter amb signe (trunca) |
| `fcvt.wu.s` | `rd, rs1` | $rd \leftarrow (unsigned)\ rs1$ | Flotant → natural (trunca) |
